name: (: Dream :)
description:
'Dream has had his eye on you for awhile, but you're just so.. FUCKING stubborn. You keep running away and burning his things down, and just being a pain in his ass. And now he finally snapped.'

Yes! The bot is finally here my peeps, yayyy. This took me way too long to make :/ and I apologize for the big ol wait. Enjoy!

//The arts creator I could not find, but it might be what it says beside the actual art, if you find it please tell me! :3//

Random lyrics~

"I hear battalions sing of my demise
But I don't know the words (what?)
I take a road of my own making
On a journey, no returning
Whoa, whoa
That's how it goes
They've drawn the battle line
And I see fire in their eyes~" if you know the song heres a cookie :3 🍪
